mapper.select: SELECT milestone_id AS milestoneId, project_id AS projectId, user_code AS userCode, milestone_title AS milestoneTitle, milestone_describe AS milestoneDescribe, finish_date AS finishDate, milestone_status AS milestoneStatus, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, parent_milestone_id AS parentMilestoneId FROM milestone WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT milestone_id AS milestoneId, COUNT(*) AS totalTaskCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN task_progress = 100 THEN 1 END) AS closedTaskCount, ROUND(AVG(NVL(task_progress, 0))) AS progressPercentage FROM task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND milestone_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY milestone_id

SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_status AS taskStatus, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, tt.type_name AS typeName FROM ( /* 1. 필요한 최소 컬럼만 뽑아서 20건 페이징 */ SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, a.task_id, a.task_title, a.task_status, a.task_progress, a.task_manager, a.type_id FROM ( SELECT task_id, task_title, task_status, task_progress, task_manager, type_id FROM task WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC, task_id DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) t /* 2. 최종 추출된 20건에 대해서만 이름 정보 조인 */ LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id WHERE t.rnum >= #{startRow} ORDER BY t.rnum ASC

SELECT CASE task_status WHEN 'e1' THEN '신규' WHEN 'e2' THEN '진행 중' WHEN 'e3' THEN '완료' WHEN 'e4' THEN '결함' ELSE '미지정' END AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY task_status

SELECT priority AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND priority IS NOT NULL GROUP BY priority

SELECT tp.type_name AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task t JOIN task_types tp ON t.type_id = tp.type_id WHERE t.milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY tp.type_name, t.type_id

SELECT NVL(u.user_name, '미지정') AS groupName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closedCount FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND t.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY u.user_name
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(milestone_id), 0) + 1 AS milestoneId FROM milestone
INSERT INTO milestone ( milestone_id, project_id, user_code, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, parent_milestone_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{milestoneId}, #{projectId}, #{userCode}, #{milestoneTitle}, #{milestoneDescribe}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{milestoneStatus}, #{parentMilestoneId}, SYSDATE, NULL )

SELECT NVL(MAX(milestone_id), 0) + 1 AS milestoneId FROM milestone
INSERT INTO milestone ( milestone_id, project_id, user_code, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, parent_milestone_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{milestoneId}, #{projectId}, #{userCode}, #{milestoneTitle}, #{milestoneDescribe}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{milestoneStatus}, #{parentMilestoneId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT milestone_id AS milestoneId, milestone_title AS milestoneTitle FROM milestone WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND parent_milestone_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT type_id AS typeId, type_name AS typeName FROM task_types ORDER BY type_id ASC

WITH task_stats AS ( SELECT milestone_id, ROUND(AVG(NVL(task_progress, 0))) AS progress_percentage FROM task WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId} GROUP BY milestone_id ) SELECT m.milestone_id AS milestoneId, m.project_id AS projectId, m.user_code AS userCode, m.milestone_title AS milestoneTitle, m.milestone_describe AS milestoneDescribe, m.finish_date AS finishDate, m.milestone_status AS milestoneStatus, m.parent_milestone_id AS parentMilestoneId, NVL(ts.progress_percentage, 0) AS progressPercentage FROM milestone m LEFT JOIN task_stats ts ON m.milestone_id = ts.milestone_id WHERE m.milestone_id = #{milestoneId}

SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_status AS taskStatus, t.priority AS priority, u.user_name AS taskManager, tt.type_name AS typeName FROM task t LEFT OUTER JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code LEFT OUTER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id WHERE t.milestone_id = #{milestoneId} AND t.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT milestone_id AS milestoneId, milestone_title AS milestoneTitle FROM milestone WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND parent_milestone_id IS NULL AND milestone_id != #{milestoneId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE milestone SET milestone_title = #{milestoneTitle}, milestone_describe = #{milestoneDescribe}, finish_date = #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, parent_milestone_id = #{parentMilestoneId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, updated_at = SYSDATE, milestone_status = #{milestoneStatus} WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}

UPDATE milestone SET milestone_title = #{milestoneTitle}, milestone_describe = #{milestoneDescribe}, finish_date = #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, milestone_status = #{milestoneStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}

UPDATE milestone m SET m.milestone_status = ( SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(AVG(t.task_progress), 0) = 100 THEN 'g2' ELSE 'g1' END FROM task t WHERE t.milestone_id = m.milestone_id ) WHERE m.milestone_id = #{milestoneId}
